name: Agent Guardrails — Bedrock
description: Amazon Bedrock Guardrails for content filtering, PII protection, topic denial, and profanity blocking. Configurable filter strengths per category.

resources.name: Bedrock Guardrail
resources.description: Content filters, PII detection, topic denial, and word filters

resources.name: Guardrail Version
resources.description: Published version of the guardrail configuration

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Project name used for resource naming

parameters.name: content_filters
parameters.description: Content filter types (SEXUAL, VIOLENCE, HATE, INSULTS, MISCONDUCT, PROMPT_ATTACK) with input/output strengths (NONE, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH)

parameters.name: pii_entities
parameters.description: PII entity types (EMAIL, PHONE, CREDIT_DEBIT_CARD_NUMBER, etc.) with action (BLOCK or ANONYMIZE)

parameters.name: denied_topics
parameters.description: Topics to deny with name, definition, and examples
